bio: Vulnerability Assessment & Penetration Testing (VAPT) specialist with hands-on experience securing web applications, networks, and cloud-facing assets. Currently a Project Engineer at Palc Networks, Chennai, where I run vulnerability assessments, harden email security (SPF, DKIM, DMARC), and operate Wazuh SIEM for real-time threat monitoring. B.E. in Computer Science from Mepco Schlenk Engineering College.

Acknowledged in the Hall of Fame / Vulnerability Disclosure Programs of NASA, WHO, UNESCO, BBC, the Singapore Cyber Security Agency, Swiss Post, IOM, USDA, the U.S. Department of Energy, CERT-EU, and India's NCIIPC (Top 15 Contributor) — 19+ organizations to date. I follow structured methodologies (OWASP Top 10, manual + tool-assisted testing) to find and responsibly report real-world vulnerabilities, backed by certifications in WiFi Pentesting and API Pentesting & Bug Bounty.

services.title: Web Application VAPT
services.text: Manual and automated testing of web apps against the OWASP Top 10 — auth flaws, injection, business-logic and access-control issues.

services.title: Network & Infrastructure VAPT
services.text: Vulnerability assessments and penetration testing across internal and external network infrastructure, with remediation guidance.

services.title: Bug Bounty & Vulnerability Research
services.text: 19+ Hall of Fame / acknowledgement recognitions from NASA, WHO, UNESCO, BBC, USDA, U.S. DoE, CERT-EU and others for responsible disclosure.

services.title: Security Operations & Hardening
services.text: SIEM monitoring (Wazuh), email security hardening (SPF/DKIM/DMARC), and IAM configuration (OKTA, Auth0, SSO, MFA).
